name: Mukhyamantri Kanya Sumangala Yojana
target_group: Girl children from economically weaker families
description: Financial assistance to girl children in 6 stages from birth to graduation to promote health, education & gender equality.

name: Mukhyamantri Samuhik Vivah Yojana
description: Financial assistance for mass weddings covering expenses for brides from economically weaker sections.

name: Mission Shakti
target_group: All women and girls of UP
description: Umbrella initiative for women safety, dignity & empowerment through multiple sub-schemes.

name: Old Age Pension Scheme (SSPY)
description: Monthly financial assistance to eligible senior citizens through Aadhaar-based DBT.

name: Widow Pension Scheme (Nirashrit Mahila)
description: Monthly financial support to destitute widows through DBT.

name: Divyang Pension Scheme
description: Monthly support to persons with disabilities through Aadhaar-linked DBT.

name: Rashtriya Parivarik Laabh Yojana
target_group: BPL families who lost primary breadwinner
description: One-time financial aid to BPL families upon death of primary earner.

name: UP Kisan Rin Mochan Yojana (Loan Waiver)
target_group: Small & marginal farmers with crop loans
description: Waiver of agricultural loans up to ₹1 lakh for small and marginal farmers.

name: Mukhyamantri Krishak Durghatna Kalyan Yojana
description: Financial aid to farmer families for accidental death or disability during farming.

name: Kisan Uday Yojana (Solar Pumps)
target_group: Farmers with old diesel/electric irrigation pumps
description: Replacement of inefficient irrigation pumps with energy-efficient solar pumps.

name: Kisan Asaan Kist Yojana
description: Allows farmers to pay pending electricity bills in easy installments.

name: One District One Product (ODOP)
target_group: Local artisans, MSME, craftspeople across 75 districts
description: Flagship initiative promoting indigenous industries and local crafts in every district.

name: Sevayojan Portal (Employment Exchange)
description: Digital platform connecting job seekers with employment opportunities and govt employment fairs.

name: CM Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme (CMAPS)
description: Encourages industries to train youth through apprenticeship with government-supplemented stipend.

name: Kaushal Satrang / YUVA Hub
description: Umbrella skill development scheme with 7 sub-programs for youth employability.

name: Atal Residential Schools (Atal Awasiya Vidyalaya)
per_person_benefit: Free CBSE residential education + all expenses
target_group: Children of construction workers & COVID orphans
description: Free high-quality CBSE residential schools in every division for construction workers' children.

name: Pre-Matric & Post-Matric Scholarship
description: Extensive scholarship programs for students from marginalized communities.

name: Free School Bag & Uniform Scheme
per_person_benefit: Free bags, uniforms, shoes for govt school students
description: Provides educational essentials to government school students to reduce dropout rates.

name: Ayushman Bharat PMJAY (UP Implementation)
description: Health insurance coverage of ₹5 lakh per family for secondary & tertiary care hospitalization.

name: Mukhyamantri Jan Arogya Yojana
description: State-specific health scheme to bridge gaps and provide additional coverage to vulnerable families.

name: PMAY-Gramin (Rural Housing, UP)
description: Providing pucca houses with toilet, electricity & gas connections to rural poor families.

name: PMAY-Urban (Urban Housing, UP)
description: Housing for urban poor with interest subsidy and construction assistance.

name: BC Sakhi (Banking Correspondent)
target_group: Rural women for doorstep banking services
description: Empowering rural women to provide banking services at grassroots level.

name: Mahila Samarthya Yojana
description: Focuses on skill development and entrepreneurship promotion for women.
